summary: Verified frontend dependency fix (React 19->18, Router 7->6, deps consolidation) via reference build inspection + UI runtime regression on preview URL. Build clean, all portal routes render, no console errors.

build_verification.npm_install: Exit 0, NO ERESOLVE, NO peer dep conflicts (1527 packages, only deprecation warns)

runtime_regression.landing_page: OK - hero+gallery renders (3 images), title correct
runtime_regression.login_admin: OK - POST /api/auth/login, redirects to /portal, sonner toast fires (1 [data-sonner-toast] node)

sidebar_navigation.Settings (/portal/settings): OK - admin User Management, Company Profile, Audit Logs tabs render

runtime_regression.reports_page: 23 card elements, 16 recharts wrappers (recharts renders on React 18), KPI card click works
runtime_regression.daily_report_auto_query: /portal/master-dispatch/daily-report?date=2026-06-14 auto-generates - page renders with date visible (useSearchParams Router 6 API working)

critical_code_review_comments: eslint 8.57.1 is EOL per npm warning - non-blocking, but future maintenance concern
25 npm audit vulnerabilities (9 low/8 mod/8 high) inherited from CRA - typical for react-scripts 5, not a regression
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dep downgrade to React 18 + Router 6 verified clean. Sidebar routes: master-dispatch/{list,daily-report,create,bulk-upload,search}, modules/{asn,eway-bill,vendor-ack}, dispatch-entry, packing, reports, settings. Note /portal/automation/* is NOT a route - modules live under /portal/modules/*.
